## Fixture

- Fixture id:
- Input class: screenshot / photo / multi-panel / TIC+ions / stacked traces / other
- Expected graph count:
- Actual graph count:

## Mode

- [ ] Deterministic
- [ ] E2B
- [ ] E4B
- [ ] GGUF

## Result

- Report gate:
- Validator verdict:
- Runtime failure class:
- First failing stage:

## Evidence Available

- [ ] RuntimeEvidencePackage JSON
- [ ] Validator JSON/Markdown
- [ ] Report JSON/HTML/Markdown
- [ ] graphPanel overlay
- [ ] plotArea overlay
- [ ] axis/tick/calibration evidence
- [ ] trace overlay
- [ ] peak evidence

## What Looks Wrong

Explain the fixture failure without hiding blocked or review-only status.

## Privacy Check

Before attaching files, remove private chromatogram images, local paths, raw
logs, and sensitive scientific context that should not be public.
